'''Ferob''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Iron Fist (Victory-class)|''Iron Fist'']].<ref name="Into the Unknown Region" />

==Biography==
He served in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] with [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] and helped subjugate [[UR41-284]]. Despite serving with Thrawn, he was a [[Humanocentrism|humanocentrist]].<ref name="Into the Unknown Region" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=In the Unknown Regions|book=Dark Force Rising Sourcebook|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
